title: Review Fleet Status On the Overall System AGV Status Screen
summary: Use the Overall System AGV Status screen to review fleet-wide AGV information. The source describes a top section with detailed information for all AGVs and a bottom section that shows only AGVs with errors, allowing the user to identify AGVs currently reported with errors.
when_to_use: Use when reviewing fleet-level AGV status and identifying which AGVs are currently shown with errors on the Overall System AGV Status screen.
not_for: Correcting AGV faults or performing recovery actions, because this source only supports status review.
Using fields or controls beyond ID, Status, Destination, and Errors, because no additional screen interactions are supported by this source.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the Overall System AGV Status screen and identify AGVs currently shown with errors.

safety_notes: This source supports a screen-based review procedure only.
Do not infer corrective actions, control actions, or system changes from this source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Overall System AGV Status screen
Visibility of AGV fields for ID, Status, Destination, and Errors

access_required: Access to the Overall System AGV Status screen
system_preconditions: The Overall System AGV Status screen is available and visible.
The AGV detail fields are visible on the screen.

visual_references.description: Overall System AGV Status screen showing the two-section layout, with detailed AGV information in the top section and AGVs with errors in the bottom section.

steps.title: Open the Overall System AGV Status screen
steps.purpose: Access the fleet-level AGV status view described by the source.
steps.instruction: Open or navigate to the screen labeled "Overall System AGV Status."
steps.expected_result: The Overall System AGV Status screen is visible.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen heading and two-section layout are visible.
steps.failure_condition: The screen is unavailable or the expected Overall System AGV Status view is not visible.

actions.label: Open AGV status screen
actions.exact_action: Open or navigate to the screen labeled "Overall System AGV Status."

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The "Overall System AGV Status" heading and the two-section layout.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the screen is unavailable.
Escalate if the AGV information needed is not visible.

steps.purpose: Use the top section to review detailed information for all AGVs.
steps.instruction: Review the top section, which shows detailed information for all AGVs.

steps.failure_condition: The top section is not visible or does not show the expected all-AGV detail area.

steps.title: Check AGV detail fields in the top section
steps.purpose: Review the specific AGV fields supported by the source for each AGV entry.
steps.instruction: For each AGV entry, check the fields listed by the source: ID, Status, Destination, and Errors.
steps.expected_result: Each AGV entry is reviewed using the documented fields.
steps.healthy_condition: ID, Status, Destination, and Errors are visible for AGV entries in the top section.
steps.failure_condition: The documented AGV fields are unclear, missing, or not visible.

actions.label: Inspect AGV fields

steps.title: Review the bottom section for AGVs with errors
steps.purpose: Use the exception-focused section to see which AGVs are shown with errors.
steps.instruction: Review the bottom section, which is dedicated to only AGVs with errors.
steps.expected_result: The bottom section shows the AGVs currently listed with errors.
steps.healthy_condition: The bottom section is visible and functions as the AGVs-with-errors area.
steps.failure_condition: The bottom section is not visible or the AGVs-with-errors area is unclear.

actions.label: Inspect error section
actions.exact_action: Review the bottom section, which is dedicated to only AGVs with errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the AGV information needed is not visible.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Bottom Section: Only AGVs with errors.

steps.title: Identify AGVs currently reported with errors
steps.purpose: Determine which AGVs currently have reported errors by comparing the all-AGV detail area with the error-only area.
steps.instruction: Compare the AGVs shown in the bottom section against the detailed information visible in the top section to identify which AGVs currently have reported errors.
steps.expected_result: The AGVs currently shown with errors are identified.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGVs listed in the bottom section can be matched to the detailed entries in the top section.
steps.failure_condition: The AGVs with errors cannot be clearly identified from the displayed information.

actions.label: Compare top and bottom sections
actions.exact_action: Compare the AGVs shown in the bottom section against the detailed information visible in the top section to identify which AGVs currently have reported errors.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the top section AGV details together with the bottom section error-only list to identify AGVs with reported errors.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if an AGV appears to have an error but the displayed information is unclear from the documented fields in this source.

success_criteria: The Overall System AGV Status screen is visible.
The user can review the top section for all AGVs.
The user can review ID, Status, Destination, and Errors for AGV entries.
The user can identify which AGVs are currently listed with errors using the bottom section.
healthy_conditions: The Overall System AGV Status screen is available.
The top section shows detailed information for all AGVs.
The documented fields ID, Status, Destination, and Errors are visible.
The bottom section shows only AGVs with errors.
failure_conditions: The Overall System AGV Status screen is unavailable.
The AGV information needed is not visible.
The documented AGV fields are unclear from the screen.
An AGV appears to have an error but the displayed information is unclear from the documented fields in this source.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the screen is unavailable or the AGV information needed is not visible.
Escalate if an AGV appears to have an error but the displayed information is unclear from the documented fields in this source.
